name: podman-from-source-install
description: Build and install full Podman 4.0+ from source on Debian/PureOS systems where apt repos only ship 3.x. Use when: (1) host has GLIBC < 2.32 and needs a container engine for Mojo development, (2) apt repos only provide Podman 3.x, (3) GitHub static binary fails because it is podman-remote not full podman.
